name: Google Vertex AI
description: Google Cloud Vertex AI — Gemini 2.5 Pro, Gemini 2.0 Flash, and Anthropic models via enterprise-grade Google Cloud infrastructure.

setup_steps.text: Open Google Cloud Console and enable Vertex AI API
Create a service account with Vertex AI User role
Generate and download a JSON key for the service account
Paste the JSON key content into the service_account_json field
Set project_id to your Google Cloud project ID and location (e.g. us-central1)
